text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 
20 
BENE_RACE_ETHNCTY_CD 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary Race and Ethnicity 
DESCRIPTION: Beneficiary race and ethnicity code. 
LONG NAME: BENE_RACE_ETHNCTY_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
CCW 
VALUES: 
1 = American Indian or Alaska Native 
2 = Asian or Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander 
3 = Black or African American 
4 = Hispanic or Latino 
5 = White 
6 = Other Race
